headline: Advanced Therapeutics (Aging and Wellness) Market Report Now Available; 146-Page Study Profiling Abbott, Nestlé, Herbalife, Amway & 11 Others, Covering Sports, Functional & Therapeutic Nutrition
summary: The global advanced therapeutics market, focused on aging and wellness, is set to grow from $154.89 billion in 2024 to $275.35 billion by 2035, at a CAGR of 5.51%. This market, covering nutritional formulations and functional bioactives, is driven by aging populations, chronic conditions, and a shift toward preventive health. North America leads the market due to its robust healthcare ecosystem and consumer awareness. Key segments in the market include functional nutrition, energy and active agi
